summary: A clipped TV news interview of Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling (Bloomberg 'Big Take' / Newsmax) saying jobs, manufacturing and industry are 'coming back,' intercut with a Fed/Powell news shot. Standard broadcast talking-head with channel bugs, lower-third name plate and a scrolling chyron; despite the high music_score it has no music bed or stylized editing. Out of scope: lightly-clipped news interview, not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: KEITH SONDERLING ACTING SECRETARY OF LABOR; POWELL: VERY AWARE PEOPLE ARE EXPERIENCING HIGHER PRICES; NEWSMAX
